title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: Three high-severity reports were reviewed and resolved: (1) spam_wave_42 was banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels. (2) toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. (3) report_006 against core_maintainer was closed as a false positive — the reports came from a coordinated brigading campaign after a moderation decision. All three reports are now closed.
